name: Sarah Chen
description: Oversees all vendor relationships and procurement decisions. Final approver for new supplier contracts above £5,000. Must be notified for all first-time vendor payments.

name: James Mitchell
description: Chief Financial Officer. Must be notified for all payments above £10,000 and any blocked transactions. Reviews monthly vendor spending reports.

name: Priya Sharma
description: Manages day-to-day accounts payable operations. Processes all approved payments and reconciles vendor invoices. Primary contact for payment queries.

name: Marcus Thompson
description: Handles vendor onboarding for technology and SaaS suppliers. Reviews contracts for IT-related purchases and software licensing agreements.

name: Elena Rodriguez
description: Responsible for regulatory compliance and anti-money laundering policies. Must be notified for any HIGH risk assessments or blocked payments.

name: David Park
description: Controls financial reporting and budget adherence. Approves expenditures that exceed departmental budgets. Reviews all flagged transactions.

name: Amara Okafor
description: Analyses vendor pricing, contract terms, and spend patterns. Identifies cost-saving opportunities and flags unusual purchasing behaviour.

name: Robert Hayes
description: Head of legal department. Reviews vendor contracts with non-standard terms. Must be consulted for vendors in regulated industries or international jurisdictions.

name: Lisa Wang
description: Leads cybersecurity operations. Must be notified when onboarding technology vendors or SaaS providers that will have access to company systems or data.

name: Tom Bradley
description: Chief Executive Officer. Only notified for strategic vendor partnerships, unusually large transactions above £50,000, or critical compliance escalations.

name: Fatima Al-Hassan
description: Processes vendor invoices, verifies purchase orders, and handles payment scheduling. First point of contact for vendor payment disputes.

name: Alex Novak
description: Performs due diligence checks on new vendors. Screens for sanctions, PEP lists, and adverse media. Handles KYC/KYB documentation.

name: Rachel Kim
description: Oversees operational efficiency across departments. Manages vendor performance for operational supplies and services. Approves logistics vendor onboarding.

name: Daniel Foster
description: Monitors vendor security posture and conducts third-party risk assessments. Reviews data processing agreements for new technology vendors.

name: Sophie Turner
description: Conducts audits on procurement processes and vendor payments. Reviews flagged transactions for compliance with internal policies. Reports to the audit committee.

name: Chris Oduya
description: Manages cash flow forecasting and payment timing. Coordinates international wire transfers and foreign currency payments. Handles banking relationships.

name: Hannah Brooks
description: Manages supplier relationships for facilities, office supplies, and operational services. Handles vendor contract renewals and service level agreements.

name: Kevin Zhao
description: Chief Operating Officer. Oversees all operational vendor relationships. Notified for vendors that impact business operations or when rapid onboarding patterns are detected.

name: Maria Santos
description: Performs detailed audits on high-value vendor transactions. Reviews cross-invoice patterns and investigates potential procurement fraud.

name: Nathan Clarke
description: Manages end-to-end supply chain vendor relationships. Responsible for vendor performance monitoring, delivery tracking, and supply chain risk management.
